creator: g.roseman@mailbox.org
text:
Created attachment 202994
gpodder log showing version assertion failure

The FreeBSD port of multimedia/gpodder is at version 3.9.3 since December 2016.  Other O.S. such as OpenBSD and Linux are using the newer version 3.10.x for at least a year.  People such as myself who have accumulated extensive podcast collections are finding that we can not access them in FreeBSD.  gpodder crashes with an assertion failure. I'm not aware of any way to revert from the newer version in which I accumulated 40 GB of podcasts to the older version of gpodder available in FreeBSD. Moving to the newer version should not create a problem for FreeBSD users who are migrating forward.
